_instructions: Copy to assistants/<name>/config.json. Remove _instructions fields. Create via VAPI API then update config.json with the returned ID.
name: VOICE_NAME - RKT EVENT_NAME Reminder

voice._note: Active Indian American voices: Sagar (steady/professional), Rohan (bright/energetic), Neil (clear/professional)

firstMessage: Opening line when call is answered. Keep under 30 words. Start with Radhey Radhey or Namaste.
voicemailMessage: Message if no answer. 20-30 seconds when spoken aloud. Include event dates and website.
endCallMessage: Thank you so much for your time! We hope to see you at the celebration. Have a blessed day — Radhey Radhey!
